base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of boss_phantom_bat_fly — a character (boss) from 1986 castlevania. Giant Phantom Bat — 2-frame wing-flap. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Giant Phantom Bat — 2-frame wing-flap; boss of Level 1 Entrance. Swoops in arcs, drops red fireball projectiles
